opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These little bumps have been there for months, but today the whole area turned bright red, swollen, and it's too painful for them to walk normally.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A cluster of long-standing groin bumps suddenly went red, swollen and sore today.

symptom_narrative.onset: bumps for ~4 months; sudden redness/swelling over 48h, worst today
symptom_narrative.duration: 4 months of bumps; acute flare 1-2 days
symptom_narrative.character: small firm dome-shaped bumps; now several are red, swollen and mildly sore
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: mild discomfort, walking with a slight limp from friction; not systemically unwell
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right groin crease and upper inner thigh
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a dry itchy rash around the bumps; some bumps in lines where scratched; no fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the bumps have been there for months, painless until now
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: mild limp from friction; otherwise well

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: cluster of small skin bumps in the groin for ~4 months

communication_style.typical_message_style: parent anxious about a spreading infection

objective_data_offered.value: about 15 small firm dome-shaped bumps in the right groin/inner thigh; the uninflamed ones have a tiny central dimple; several central ones are now surrounded by a 3-4cm patch of bright redness and mild swelling; a dry itchy rash rings the cluster
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent's description/camera; cannot palpate for deep induration/abscess
